issue: Soft-delete filter missing in ProfileService queries
detail: findAll() and findById() do not filter deleted_at IS NULL, allowing deleted profiles to be returned
failure_scenario: User deletes profile; it reappears in list view or on edit because findAll() includes soft-deleted rows

issue: Some endpoints may be missing @PermitAll or @PreAuthorize
detail: logout, refresh must have @PermitAll or explicit auth check; register, login require @PermitAll
failure_scenario: If logout lacks @PermitAll, user cannot log out (401 Unauthorized on logout call)

issue: Repository queries may not enforce tenant_id filter
detail: All JPA findById, findAll queries must be scoped to TenantContextHolder.getTenantId()
failure_scenario: Cross-tenant data leak: User A views User B's profile by guessing ID; findById returns record outside tenant scope

issue: Refresh cookie missing SameSite=Strict and Secure flags
detail: HTTP-only cookie rotated but no SameSite=Strict prevents CSRF; Secure flag may be missing in dev
failure_scenario: CSRF attack injects fake refresh request from another domain; cookie sent due to missing SameSite

issue: JWT filter skiplist may be incomplete or missing
detail: Filter must skip /auth/register, /auth/login, /actuator/health but skiplist not visible in provided code
failure_scenario: If /auth/login requires JWT, login fails with 401 because user has no token yet

issue: Authorization header may not be set on all requests
detail: apiClient must inject Authorization: Bearer <token> on every protected endpoint; missing check if token exists
failure_scenario: Protected API call made without token header; backend returns 401 Unauthorized

issue: CORS allowed-origins may be hardcoded or missing validation
detail: Must use env var (not hardcoded); must validate Origin header matches whitelist
failure_scenario: Hardcoded CORS breaks in Cloud Run; attacker's origin not rejected; CSRF via preflight bypass

issue: Password strength validation may be missing or weak
detail: Password must enforce minimum 12 chars, uppercase, digit, special char via regex or custom validator
failure_scenario: User registers with password '123456'; accepted by system; account easily compromised

issue: Rate limiting may not cover all sensitive endpoints
detail: register, login, refresh, logout must be rate-limited per IP/user; password reset must be protected
failure_scenario: Brute-force attack: attacker tries 10,000 passwords in 1 min; no rate limit; account compromised

issue: Form fields may not match Zod schema
detail: useForm hook registers fields; schema validation must include all fields (companyName, billingEmail, phoneNumber, city, state, zipCode, mcNumber, usdotNumber, logoUrl)
failure_scenario: User submits form; Zod validation fails on unregistered field, form submission hangs with validation error

file: frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx or any hook using axios
issue: Direct axios calls not using apiClient
detail: If any code uses import axios from 'axios' directly instead of apiClient, headers are not injected
failure_scenario: Direct axios call bypasses apiClient interceptor; Authorization header missing; request fails 401

detail: If baseURL is /api/v1 and endpoint strings also contain /api/v1, final URL becomes /api/v1/api/v1/...
failure_scenario: Frontend calls POST /api/v1/profile; apiClient concatenates to /api/v1/api/v1/profile (404 Not Found)
lines: baseURL setup, endpoint paths in hooks

issue: Cache not invalidated when profile is soft-deleted
detail: @Cacheable on getProfile may return stale data if profile is soft-deleted; cache key does not include deleted_at
failure_scenario: User deletes profile; old cached profile still returned on subsequent getProfile() calls for 5+ min

issue: Email and password validation may be incomplete
detail: @Valid @RequestBody RegisterRequest must enforce @Email, password strength, password != email
failure_scenario: User registers with invalid email (no @ sign); validation passes; system sends confirmation to malformed address

issue: TenantContextHolder.getTenantId() may return null; no null-safety check
detail: All ProfileService methods using getTenantId() must null-check or throw IllegalStateException
failure_scenario: Multi-tenant context not initialized (e.g., background job without TenantContextFilter); getTenantId() returns null; NullPointerException at runtime
